title: Luxottica Franchising Australia Pty Ltd — Regulatory action
investigation_objective: The ACCC issued Luxottica Franchising Australia Pty Ltd, franchisor of the OPSM and Laubman & Pank optical retail chains, a $19,800 infringement notice (reported March 2026) over an allegedly out-of-date Franchise Disclosure Register profile - a register that has been out of date since around May 2025 - in alleged breach of the Franchising Code of Conduct. Luxottica paid the penalty and has since updated its disclosure.
scope: Paid a $19,800 ACCC infringement notice over an allegedly out-of-date franchise disclosure register profile; Payment of an infringement notice is not an admission of liability under the ACCC's process
